title: Add Wave 27 manager property form regression matrix
description: Expand QA regression coverage for manager property create/edit flows, enriched validation envelopes, and role/session guardrails while preserving Wave 20-26 baselines.
acceptance_criteria: Regression matrix includes create and edit success cases plus deterministic field validation failures
API tests assert unauthorized, forbidden, and conflict envelopes for enriched property form routes
Wave 20-26 manager baselines remain stable after Wave 27 coverage is added
